confidence.explanation: Core FE regressions are CLEARED (confirmed across 2 independent runs): Invoice Number shows 'TOTEWCLQEH' (not INV-609.00), Hotel Room charge is $119.00 (not INV-609.00), and running balance reconciles to $126.85 matching API total_due. Two API shape questions remain open: (1) GET /so/invoice has no distinct `invoice_number` field — FE uses `sales_order_number` as Invoice Number (may be by design per INV-613/614/615 spec); (2) `so_number` field absent, only `sales_order_number` present; (3) `currency` is empty string instead of 'CAD'. These are consistent findings across run-001 and run-002 and require dev clarification. Additional note: MRDT rendered as 2% on invoice (product context documents 3%) — internally consistent math but warrants confirmation.

test_cases.title: API — GET /so/invoice returns invoice_number field
test_cases.note: GET /so/invoice returns HTTP 200. `invoice_number` field ABSENT. `sales_order_number`='TOTEWCLQEH' present and used by FE as Invoice Number. `so_number` ABSENT. `currency`='' (empty, expected CAD). `total_due`=12685 cents ✓. Consistent with run-001. Dev confirmation needed: is sales_order_number intentionally serving as invoice_number per INV-613/614/615?

test_cases.title: API — GET /so/invoice response shape includes so_number field
test_cases.note: No `so_number` field. `sales_order_number`='TOTEWCLQEH' present. `currency`='' (empty string). Consistent with run-001. Needs dev confirmation on intended field names vs spec.

test_cases.title: FE — Invoice render shows correct Invoice Number (not ticket ID placeholder)
test_cases.note: PASS. Invoice Preview dialog opened via Print Invoice button. Invoice Number: 'TOTEWCLQEH' — NOT 'INV-609' or 'INV-609.00'. 326 Room charge: $119.00 — NOT 'INV-609.00'. Balance Due: $126.85. Regression CLEARED (confirmed 2nd run).

test_cases.title: FE — Invoice total and running balance reconcile correctly
test_cases.note: PASS. Running balance: $119.00 → +$9.52 PST → $128.52 → +$2.38 MRDT → $130.90 → +$5.95 GST → $136.85 → -$5.00 dep → $131.85 → -$5.00 dep → $126.85. Matches API total_due (12685c). Regression CLEARED. Side note: MRDT shown as 2% (product context says 3%) — math consistent but warrants dev check.

test_cases.title: Universal — Console error scan
test_cases.note: PASS. 1 error: Cognito favicon.ico 404 (third-party hosted-UI resource, allowlisted). Zero application console errors.

test_cases.title: Universal — Network error scan (4xx/5xx)
test_cases.note: PASS. All 4 app API calls returned 200: GET /user/profile, POST /booking/search, GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8, POST /inventory/search.

test_cases.title: Universal — Broken asset/image scan
test_cases.note: PASS. No broken assets on reservation details or invoice preview. Cognito favicon 404 allowlisted.

open_findings.finding: GET /so/invoice: no `invoice_number` field — FE uses `sales_order_number` as Invoice Number. Confirm this is by design per INV-613/614/615.
open_findings.action: Dev clarification needed before final sign-off

open_findings.finding: GET /so/invoice: `currency` field is empty string instead of 'CAD'.
MRDT displayed as 2% on Invoice render (product context documents 3%). Math is internally consistent with 2%.
open_findings.action: Dev to confirm correct MRDT rate
